---
title: "Data Management in Literature Reviews"
date: "2026"
date-format: "YYYY"
categories: ["research-paper"]
keywords: []
journal.name: "Research Synthesis Methods"
outlet: "Research Synthesis Methods"
author: "Wagner, Gerit and Prester, Julian and Lukyanenko, Roman and Paré, Guy"
authors:
  - name: "Wagner, Gerit"
  - name: "Prester, Julian"
  - name: "Lukyanenko, Roman"
  - name: "Paré, Guy"
citation_key: "WagnerPresterLukyanenkoEtAl2026"
free_fulltext: false
self_archiving_possible_1y: false
self_archiving_possible_2y: false
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: ../../assets/metrics-scripts.html
---


## Citation (APA style)

<div class="apa-citation">
<p style="text-indent:-2.5em; margin-left:2.5em;">
Wagner, G., Prester, J., Lukyanenko, R., &amp; Paré, G. (2026). Data Management in Literature Reviews. *Research Synthesis Methods*.
</p>
</div>


## Citation: BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{WagnerPresterLukyanenkoEtAl2026,
  author     = {Wagner, Gerit and Prester, Julian and Lukyanenko, Roman and Paré, Guy},
  title      = {Data Management in Literature Reviews},
  journal    = {Research Synthesis Methods},
  year       = {2026}
}
```


## Citation: RIS

```bibtex
TY  - JOUR
AU  - Wagner, Gerit
AU  - Prester, Julian
AU  - Lukyanenko, Roman
AU  - Paré, Guy
TI  - Data Management in Literature Reviews
T2  - Research Synthesis Methods
PY  - 2026
ER  - 
```
